name: uniqlo / Fashion workflow 510
task: Locate a large store in Washington that has kids' and maternity products, also check if they have a parking lot, and see the directions of the nearest store.
goal_pattern: Locate a large store in Washington that has kids' and maternity products, also check if they have a parking lot, and see the directions of the nearest store.

applicability.when_to_use: Use for tasks with a similar goal on the same site area.
